Froststone Stein  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
CHA: +10 AGI: +10
SV COLD: +20
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Froststone Stein
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
CHA: +10 AGI: +10
SV COLD: +20
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Tolon Rex
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 02:31:29
Page Updated:Tue Jul 7th, 2015

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 40
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Crystal Caverns
NPC Name
a hollow crystal


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Crystal Caverns
Najena
Dropped from a Hollow Terror. Name has changed since screenshot.


Uploaded September 10th, 2017 by Nniki
Send a correction
Post Comment
Charisma vrs Selling
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2005 at 3:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591817178752
11 posts
Chembrad you may want to get Opal Encrusted Steins. They give you 25 charisma each. I believe the Split Paw Choker is also A charisma item. With the three of them, you should have no trouble getting a good price with the npc merchants =)
▲ Page top
New name
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2003 at 7:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758156720
Scholar
36 posts
I looted one of these today and the name is changed to A Froststone Stein. Dropped from the Hollow Terror and has the same stats.
▲ Page top
Tradeskills and merchants
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2001 at 12:24 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591753780492
15 posts
well, this is not only for enchanters. I'm an ogre with very poor charisma, and I'm also a blacksmith. I could use this and a crude stein when I'm selling to merchants and when I'm buying things for my smithing. =) If I were in a group with an enchanter, I'd definately let the chanter get it, but otherwise, I'd love to have it nestled next to my crude stein in my backpack.
▲ Page top
Excellent item for us chanters
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2001 at 10:51 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591759142615
2 posts
I got mine tonight, looted off a Hollow Crystal, by entrance to the Geonid area. A very fine item for chanters, I have replaced my stein of moggok, and am now holding one crude stein and this. Very handy for reaching that cha 200 barrier as one can equip both, and moving your max mana barrier with int is overrated for enchanters.

The agi from it also bumped my agi up to 80, past the magic 75, so I gain about 40 ac from wearing it. I don't see any immediate application for the cold resist short of special fights and raids, but I don't really feel that is why I am wearing this item. 10 cha and 40 AC should do.

Itun
36th Enchanter
Innoruuk
▲ Page top
RE: Excellent item for us chanters
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965989413
134 posts
20 CR is good for fighting Wizards, they have many Cold spells. Yes, many Magic and Fire spells, but also many cold spells. Not sure if this changes towards the high end, but I imagine this would be great on a PvP server.
▲ Page top
RE: Excellent item for us chanters
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 4:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766739635
10 posts
Bah... The Rod is better. Quest is fairly easy too. I had mine at 30 and am still using it (43rd). Rod is +12 Cha and 4ac, and it looks cool. *grins*
▲ Page top
Gee...
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 8:29 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763380826
6 posts
Another chanter mug.

/bonk verant

The question is, does one replace their Crude Stein or Glamour rod? Now, yes, logically the crude stein has more cha, but few items in the game spam as well as the rod. And it's TARGETABLE spam at that!

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 18 2001 at 10:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey my clickable SoW epic boots work just dandy! (plus the fireworks can crash a lesses system :) people usually yell when I click it 3 times or so (bragging, I can't help it!)
Odd
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 6:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756561707
16 posts
This is a good upgrade to crude stein. The nice resist to cold and agility are great.

But I wonder how would a stein increase charisma, filled with beer a drunk Gnome or High Elf is not very charismatic. Just my 2 cents =)
▲ Page top
RE: Odd
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2005 at 9:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762755253
115 posts
I think the CHA is from HAVING the beer, not from drinking it.... I would bet that most dorfs would find the owner irresistable with this in hand full of alcoholic drink of any kind... Picture a lip smacking dwarf with beer dripping from his mustache...eh?
▲ Page top
nice for trades
QuoteReply
# May 26 2001 at 1:47 PM Rating: Default

157 posts
Get this a cha neck piece and a crude stein, voila ur trade skill freak :P

Spawn point
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 5:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756550456
7 posts
I looted one on a hollow crystal that spawned at the begining of the ramp to zone, just before the first geonid.
▲ Page top
Suni
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 9:45 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Our group on Xegony was having a Mid level raid in CC. We had two groups, which were split up. One group camped the queen while the other was knocking the spit out of the terrors. This item dropped and we didn't have a chanter in raid but we did have a bard. Good item to use when charming, I hear. He was happy to see it too.. heh...
▲ Page top
Bunch of Drunks
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2001 at 8:12 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This is a nice enchanter item.
Only lose 2 cha to Rod of Insidious Glamour and gain a few ac and lots of cold resist.
Heh I just have one question... why are all the good enchanter held items steins, I just got rid of my Stein of Moggok for a rod of insidious glamour. Now I get this and i'm stuck holding two steins again!
"sigh"
I guess Verant thinks all enchanters are drunkards

Tastern
Erudite Enchanter of the 38th circle
Tastul@aol.com

One nice thing about 2 steins is that if you get charmed (I'm thinking Paw for myself), then you can't actually hurt your fellow group members! They will wonder why you are staring at them silently for minutes at a time LOL!

Justu
35 Enchanter, HIE

... Not quite, if you're charmed, you won't melee them but you will cast as if you had all (I repeat ALL) spells available to you at that level memorized and that can be worse.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 13 2001 at 4:18 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this is a pretty crappy item if you ask me, casters wont use it too save slot for +int or +wis item, melee either cant cause of 2HS,b,p or because of duelwield, so all in all i think it is stupid, just my 2cp though
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 13 2001 at 1:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Before you go calling something stupid, learn to spell dual wield. Dual, as in two. Not duel as in duel to the death. What kind of schools are you kids going to these days? And anyway, look at how many enchanters carry crude steins... This would be a better item imho because of the resists.

QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2001 at 6:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752393526
Scholar
281 posts
Hmmm, lore, no drop, worthless (not quite) stats.

Can we say "QUEST"? Maybe we have finally found the item that lests not rogues and enchanters to buy and sell in Crystal Cavers. I can hope anyway.
▲ Page top
RE: pretty worthless
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2002 at 7:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764683852
19 posts
I tried giving this Stein to every NPC in Froststone without success: they all gave it back to me. Now, granted, I am 'Dubious' to everyone there, but I think I still would've gotten *some* sort of reaction if the Stein was part of a quest they give out.

That said, I still think it is a Quest Item, but either:

1) My faction is too poor to get any sort of reaction when presenting a bonafide quest item;

2) The Quest is given somewhere else;

3) The Quest the Stein is part of is broken.

I think #3 is the most likely case, as I've heard that there are several broken quests and unprogrammed faction adjustments in this Zone. I'll still keep hold of my Stein for a while just in case I come across something.
▲ Page top
RE: pretty worthless
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2001 at 3:16 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
That plus 10 cha makes a nice bonuse to anyone who wants to buy from a vendor. That 10 Agi is good for anyone who doesn't want to get hit as offen, if encumbered. And that plus 20 cold resist is nuts when fighting monsters with a cold based attack. As a chanter I would easily drop my insidious rod of glamor and equip this instead. I loose 2 cha, but would pick up that insain cold resist.
